title: ConceptManifest
description: Output of surface-planning. Maps how a concept's actions, emissions, and state surface to users per channel.

target_channels.description: Registered channel keys this concept is expected to cover. When present, validation requires a surface for each target channel unless the channel appears in channel_exclusions.

channel_exclusions.description: Channels intentionally not targeted by this concept, each with a reason. Use for concept-level channel exclusions, distinct from per-surface action exclusions.

channel.description: Channel key intentionally excluded for this concept.

reason.description: Why this concept does not target the channel.

channel.description: The channel key through which the concept surfaces. Open string; when a channels.json registry is present, must be a registered key (e.g. web-ui, cli, mcp, api, http-rest, webhook).

actions.description: Affordance projections: how each canonical concept action is invoked on this channel. Key name kept for compatibility; each entry references one action and describes its channel-specific projection.

action.description: Action name (must match an action in the concept definition).

element.description: The affordance: what the user sees or types (button, command, tool descriptor, route, slash command).

label.description: The display text or command syntax.

emissions.description: Emission projections: how each canonical concept emission is delivered, published, subscribed to, or received on this channel.

emission.description: Emission name (must match an emission in the concept definition).

element.description: The delivery or receipt affordance (webhook callback, event stream item, feed item, notification, toast, event-bus topic).

label.description: The event name, topic, feed label, notification label, or delivery syntax.

exclusions.description: Actions intentionally not surfaced on this channel, each with a reason. Satisfies the coverage rule for an action that has no sensible affordance here.

action.description: Action name (must match an action in the concept definition).

reason.description: Why this action is not surfaced on this channel (e.g. 'interactive hover gesture; no CLI analogue').

emission_exclusions.description: Emissions intentionally not projected on this channel, each with a reason. Satisfies the coverage rule for an emission that has no sensible delivery or receipt affordance here.

emission.description: Emission name (must match an emission in the concept definition).

reason.description: Why this emission is not projected on this channel.

component.description: State component name (must match a component in the concept definition).

element.description: How the state is made visible.

visibility.description: When the state is shown to the user.

op_hint.description: How the user discovers the operational principle through this channel.

gaps.description: Actions or state with no surface, or surfaces that are inadequate.
